Klasse Caregiver

java.lang.Object
de.hitec.nhplus.model.Person
de.hitec.nhplus.model.Caregiver
public class Caregiver extends Person
Caregiver of the Nursing home, treating the patients

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Caregiver

      public Caregiver(String firstName, String surname, LocalDate dateOfBirth, String street, String postalcode, String city, String taxid, String phoneNumber, String qualification)
      Constructor to initiate an object of class Caregiver with the given parameter. Use this constructor to initiate objects, which are not persisted yet, because it will not have a caregiver id (cid).
      Parameter:
      firstName - First name of the caregiver.
      surname - Last name of the caregiver.
      dateOfBirth - Date of birth of the caregiver.
      street - Street of the caregiver
      postalcode - Postalcode of the caregiver
      city - City of the caregiver
      taxid - Tax id of the caregiver
      phoneNumber - Phone number of the caregiver
      qualification - Qualification of the caregiver

    • Caregiver

      public Caregiver(long cid, String firstName, String surname, LocalDate dateOfBirth, String street, String postalcode, String city, String taxid, String phoneNumber, String qualification)
      Constructor to initiate an object of class Caregiver with the given parameter. Use this constructor to initiate objects, which are arlready persisted and have a caregiver id (cid).
      Parameter:
      cid - Caregiver id.
      firstName - First name of the caregiver.
      surname - Last name of the caregiver.
      dateOfBirth - Date of birth of the caregiver.
      street - Street of the caregiver.
      postalcode - Postalcode of the caregiver.
      city - City of the caregiver.
      taxid - Tax id of the caregiver.
      phoneNumber - Phone number of the caregiver.
      qualification - Qualification of the caregiver.

      public void setDateOfBirth(String dateOfBirth)
